news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total value locked increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama data.

news.title_zh: Cardano 公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，支持更强智能合约表达能力和更低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链生态。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain ecosystem.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，提议采用ZK-Rollup Layer2技术降低小额转账手续费，提升交易效率。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments and improve scalability.
